subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: In the Koran the following verse is revealed by God: 'Oh Mahomet no power save that of God...' There are two kinds of love...
subcodes.subjects: @one universal law; attractive power of love, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @love of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
